message:
chore(deps): bump GH Actions and Cargo dependencies

GH Actions: 10 action version bumps across all workflows
Cargo: 22 dependency updates in main workspace
Cargo (examples): 2 dependency updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,13 +25,13 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - name: Checkout PR branch
-        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
         with:
           cache-on-failure: true
           key: benchmarks-${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Download baseline (for PRs)
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
-        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@07ab29fd4a977ae4d2b275087cf67563dfdf0295 # v9
+        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@5c98f0b039f36ef966fdb7dfa9779262785ecb05 # v14
         with:
           workflow: benchmarks.yml
           branch: ${{ github.base_ref }}
@@ -118,7 +118,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Comment on PR
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository
-        uses: actions/github-script@60a0d83039c74a4aee543508d2ffcb1c3799cdea # v7.0.1
+        uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd # v8
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           script: |
@@ -179,7 +179,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Upload baseline artifact
         if: github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/master')
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4.6.2
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@b7c566a772e6b6bfb58ed0dc250532a479d7789f # v6.0.0
         with:
           name: criterion-baseline
           path: criterion-baseline/

@@ -24,15 +24,15 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
 
       - name: Check formatting
         run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
@@ -54,13 +54,13 @@ jobs:
           - os: macos-15-intel    # macOS x64
           - os: windows-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
         with:
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
@@ -78,15 +78,15 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
         with:
           workspaces: examples
           key: examples-${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-${{ hashFiles('examples/Cargo.lock') }}
@@ -108,7 +108,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

@@ -48,15 +48,15 @@ jobs:
             artifact_name: glow-windows-x64
 
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
         with:
           key: release-${{ matrix.target }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
@@ -78,7 +78,7 @@ jobs:
           Copy-Item "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}.exe" "dist/${{ matrix.artifact_name }}.exe"
 
       - name: Upload artifact
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4.6.2
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@b7c566a772e6b6bfb58ed0dc250532a479d7789f # v6.0.0
         with:
           name: ${{ matrix.artifact_name }}
           path: dist/*
@@ -94,10 +94,10 @@ jobs:
       contents: write
       id-token: write  # For SLSA provenance attestation
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Download all artifacts
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093 # v4.3.0
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@37930b1c2abaa49bbe596cd826c3c89aef350131 # v7.0.0
         with:
           path: artifacts
 
@@ -118,18 +118,18 @@ jobs:
         run: echo "VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
       - name: Generate SBOM
-        uses: anchore/sbom-action@f325610c9f50a54015d37c8d16cb3b0e2c8f4de0 # v0.18.0
+        uses: anchore/sbom-action@28d71544de8eaf1b958d335707167c5f783590ad # v0.22.2
         with:
           path: release/
           output-file: release/sbom.spdx.json
 
       - name: Attest build provenance
-        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@db473fddc028af60658334401dc6fa3ffd8669fd # v2.3.0
+        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@96278af6caaf10aea03fd8d33a09a777ca52d62f # v3.2.0
         with:
           subject-path: release/*
 
       - name: Create GitHub Release
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@da05d552573ad5aba039eaac05058a918a7bf631 # v2.2.2
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@a06a81a03ee405af7f2048a818ed3f03bbf83c7b # v2.5.0
         with:
           name: Release ${{ steps.version.outputs.VERSION }}
           draft: false
@@ -147,13 +147,13 @@ jobs:
     timeout-minutes: 30
     if: ${{ !inputs.dry_run && !contains(github.ref, '-') }}  # Skip pre-releases
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

       - name: Cache cargo registry

         with:
           key: publish

     timeout-minutes: 20
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2

       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: wasm32-unknown-unknown
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8

-      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2

           targets: wasm32-unknown-unknown
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8

         with:
           key: wasm-test-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}

       id-token: write
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093 # v4.3.0

           name: wasm-packages
           path: pkg/
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@49933ea5288caeca8642d1e84afbd3f7d6820020 # v4.4.0

           node-version: '20'
           registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
